creator: remko@elvandar.org
text:
>>Description:
> audio/x-gsm does not exists in magic.mime
>
> file -i -b file.gsm return application/octet-stream
>>How-To-Repeat:
> file -i -b file.gsm
>>Fix:
> add audio/x-gsm to magic.mime
>

Hello,

A quick look informed me that magic.mime comes from the "file"
application, which is contributed software. We are restrictive in doing
updates in contributed software, so I would like to ask you to post this
to the "file" maintainers instead so that they can add it to their
magic.mime, we can then persue the update at some point and have it
available as well.

Thanks for using FreeBSD and taking the time to report this!

-- 
Kind regards,

     Remko Lodder               ** remko@elvandar.org
     FreeBSD                    ** remko@FreeBSD.org

     /* Quis custodiet ipsos custodes */
